headline: How to Prove Your Illness Came from Workplace Chemical Exposure
articleBody: Proving a chemical caused your illness is harder than a broken bone because it happens over time. You'll need to link your symptoms to specific workplace toxins and safety logs. Keep a journal of when you felt sick and what you were handling. Proving this link is where legal expertise really counts. Reach out at 801-746-0290 so we can help build your case.
